key_items: Senate Confirms Bitcoin-Friendly Kevin Warsh to Fed Board, Clearing Path to Chairmanship
JPMorgan Files to Launch Tokenized Money Market Fund on Ethereum
Square Crosses 1 Million Bitcoin-Enabled Merchants as Real-World Adoption Continues to Grow
reasoning: Positive institutional adoption signals (JPMorgan tokenized funds, Square's merchant expansion) and favorable regulatory developments (Kevin Warsh confirmation, CFTC backing prediction markets) provide meaningful bullish tailwinds. However, inflation concerns and significant corporate Bitcoin liquidations (MARA $1.5B, Exodus selling) create offsetting headwinds that limit upside momentum in the near term.
risks: Hot inflation data reigniting Fed hawkishness and higher-for-longer rate expectations could cap Bitcoin's upside and reverse gains within the 1-7 day window.
